commands.review_summary:
The PR migrates session naming from the existing `label` contract toward a canonical `title` field across slash command handling, gateway schemas, session patch/resolve helpers, row types, and UI display.

PR surface: Source +62, Tests -61. Total +1 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR blockers: the incomplete contract is source-reproducible from the PR head schema/type additions and the label-only create, list, projection, and durable-entry paths. No high-confidence after-fix user-path proof has been supplied.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This draft needs contributor completion plus maintainer/API contract direction; the blocker is broader than a safe one-shot repair lane.

target.title: fix(sessions): migrate session naming to canonical title
target.body:
## Summary

This migrates session naming toward a canonical user-editable `title` while preserving the existing `label` contract for compatibility.

- Adds canonical session title helpers while preserving legacy label parsing.
- Updates `/name` to write canonical `title` and mirror `label`.
- Adds `/name --clear` to clear both fields.
- Adds gateway protocol `SessionTitleString` and keeps `SessionLabelString` as the compatibility alias.
- Adds `title` to sessions list, create, resolve, and patch schemas.
- Updates `sessions.patch` projection so `title` is canonical and `label` remains a compatibility alias.
- Updates `sessions.resolve` so callers can resolve by `title` or legacy `label`.
- Exposes `title` on the gateway row type.
- Updates UI display ordering to prefer `title`, then `label`, then `displayName`.

## Status

Draft. The core title/label contract changes are on the branch. This still needs a focused session test run before marking ready.

Remaining before ready:
- Rebase onto current `main`.
- Add or restore direct tests for `sessions.patch`, `sessions.resolve`, and list row projection.
- Wire `session-utils.ts` row projection to emit `title` directly, not only the row type.
- Add `title?: string` directly to `SessionEntry` or keep all title access behind compatibility helpers/casts.
- Run the focused gateway/session test shard.

## Real behavior proof

Head SHA: `51af18c825ab036d499241368fd74ffe5f05dc08`

GitHub Actions results on this head:
- `Workflow Sanity` run `246420`: completed successfully.
  - `actionlint` job: success.
  - `no-tabs` job: success.
  - `generated-doc-baselines` job: skipped.
- `iOS Periphery Dead Code` run `6307`: completed successfully.
  - `Detect iOS scan scope` job: success.
  - `Scan iOS dead code` job: skipped.
- `CI` run `254056`: skipped.
- `CodeQL`, `CodeQL Critical Quality`, and `OpenGrep PR Diff`: skipped.

Focused session tests have not been run yet in this environment; do not treat this as proof that the session naming behavior is fully validated.

Expected focused local command:

```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/auto-reply/reply/commands-name.test.ts src/gateway/sessions-patch.test.ts src/gateway/sessions-resolve.test.ts src/gateway/session-utils.test.ts
```
